name: product-manager-os
description: A complete operating system for product managers. Ships 40 battle-tested skills across the full product lifecycle — discovery, research, strategy, planning, execution, data, go-to-market, and team comms — each grounded in the most popular book on its topic (Mom Test, Inspired, Continuous Discovery Habits, Obviously Awesome, Good Strategy Bad Strategy, Measure What Matters, and more). Plus 5 chained slash-commands, a skill-creator, a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a learning memory system, ready-to-wire automations, and bundled getprompts + getskills libraries. From The Product Channel by Sid Saladi.
